mechanism_narrative: The 3-month rate of change in industrial production (INDPRO) is a leading indicator of economic expansion. When this change is positive, it signals accelerating supply activity and rising corporate earnings, which drives positive S&P 500 returns over the subsequent 20 trading days.
failure_condition: If the 20-day forward return after a positive 3-month change in INDPRO is not greater than zero at the 10% significance level over any rolling 3-year window.

mechanism_narrative: A sharp decline in the unemployment rate (UNRATE) over a 3-month period indicates that labor market slack is being absorbed rapidly. This signals a strengthening economy that boosts investor confidence and leads to positive SPX returns over the next 5 trading days.
candidate_trigger: UNRATE falls > 0.5 percentage points in 3 months
failure_condition: If triggered instances yield a mean 5-day forward return not significantly above zero (p > 0.05) or if the hit rate is below 55%.

mechanism_narrative: When the federal funds rate is at its effective lower bound (near zero) and inflation as measured by CPIAUCSL is moderate and trending up, the joint condition indicates acolumn accommodative monetary policy with controlled inflation, which strongly supports risk appetite. This combined signal yields positive SPX returns over the next 60 trading days, and the interaction effect is stronger than either series alone.
regime_hint: zero lower bound with moderate inflation
failure_condition: If the interaction term (FEDFUNDS * CPIAUCSL) in a regression of 60-day forward returns is not significantly positive (p > 0.1) or if the rank IC of the product signal is below 0.03 over any 2-year window.

mechanism_narrative: In a post-recession recovery regime (unemployment above 8% and real GDP growth below 3%), rising retail sales (RSAFS) signal a consumer spending recovery that drives equity prices higher over the next 20 trading days. The relationship is regime-conditional and would reverse in a late-cycle overheating environment.
failure_condition: If, within the defined recovery regime, the rank IC of RSAFS change is not positive or if the median forward 20-day return is not greater than zero over any 3-year period.

mechanism_narrative: Sustained growth in payroll employment (PAYEMS) reflects a strengthening labor market that underlies consumer spending and corporate profits. This is a comprehensive always-on trend signal: positive monthly changes in PAYEMS lead to positive S&P 500 returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: If the 60-day forward return after a positive PAYEMS change is not positive in more than 55% of cases over any 5-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: A sustained increase in housing starts (HOUST) above 700k units (2-month moving average) signals a firming housing market and broader economic recovery. This threshold-triggered signal leads to positive SPX returns over the following 20 trading days as construction activity ripples through the economy.
failure_condition: If triggered instances do not produce a median forward 20-day return above zero or if the hit rate is below 60% over the evaluation period.

mechanism_narrative: The joint improvement of industrial production (INDPRO) rising and unemployment (UNRATE) falling over the same month provides a powerful composite signal of broad-based economic momentum. When both series move in the favorable direction simultaneously, the probability of positive SPX returns over the next 5 trading days is significantly higher than the sum of their individual signals.
failure_condition: If the interaction dummy (both improving) does not have a significantly positive coefficient in a regression of 5-day forward returns (p > 0.1) or if the composite signal has a lower Sharpe ratio than the individual single-series signals.

mechanism_narrative: In a low-inflation regime (CPIAUCSL year-over-year inflation below 3%), any increase in the federal funds rate from its near-zero level signals that the Federal Reserve is beginning to normalize policy due to improving economic fundamentals. This is interpreted positively by equity markets and leads to positive SPX returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: If, within the low-inflation regime, the mean 5-day forward return after a FEDFUNDS increase is not significantly above zero (p > 0.05) or if the rank IC of the FEDFUNDS change signal is not positive.
